productDisplayName: Puma Women Wirko White Casual Shoes
description: White and pink, round toed shoes with central lace fastening Synthetic upper with overlays and reinforced overlay at the heel collar, puma cat in the midfoot region on the side, on the toe box and heel collar Padded tongue and inner with a soft footbed Rubber midsole upper adhered to the outsole in the forefoot region Rubber outsole with herringbone and branded grooves
